---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or capability enhancement for lfr-tunnel
title: '[FR] '
labels: enhancement, community-vote
assignees: ''
---

> [!TIP]
> **SE Backlog Prioritization**: If you think this feature is useful, please vote by adding a 👍 reaction to this issue description! The SE team uses reaction counts to help prioritize the roadmap.

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I'm frustrated when demonstrating X to client Y because...")

**Liferay Demo / Customer POC Impact (Business Value)**
Describe how this feature impacts active customer POCs, pre-sales demo scenarios, or general SE productivity. (e.g. "Enables presenting a mock client-domain directly in deal X").

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of the feature or logic update you want to happen.

**Suggested CLI Syntax / UI mock (if applicable)**
Show how you envision using this feature. Example:
- Command: `lfr-tunnel --throttle 500kbps`
- Dashboard: "Add toggle button on admin screen to..."

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative workarounds or tools you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
